task_objective: Implement pnpm-based frontend supply-chain hardening fixes 1-6 and document npm package-lock checks as a known potential vulnerability.
design_decisions: Kept pnpm-lock.yaml as the canonical lockfile and did not introduce package-lock.json.
Used exact dependency pins and pnpm overrides for vulnerable build-chain packages.
Used pnpm minimumReleaseAge of 20160 minutes to enforce a 14-day package release age.
Kept heavy pnpm stores under /tmp/sdh_ludusavi and left project node_modules ignored for package-manager links.
Skipped automatic npx downloads in verification; optional OSV and Socket scans only run when tools are already installed.
results: Added frontend supply-chain verification scripts and package scripts.
Resolved high-severity pnpm audit findings; one moderate build-chain advisory remains below the configured high threshold.
Fixed a strict TypeScript callback type so the new frontend typecheck gate passes.
Stabilized existing timeout/cancellation tests so the full validation suite can complete.
